caption: In an indoor gymnasium with blue tiered seating and a polished wooden floor, a man wearing a pink t-shirt and khaki shorts attempts a basketball shot. He begins by leaping forward into the air, launching a basketball toward the hoop. As the sequence progresses, he reaches the peak of his jump, extending his arms upward toward the ball as it arcs toward the rim. He then begins his descent, landing on the court with his arms outstretched for balance. Throughout the action, the ball travels through the air, eventually passing the rim and bouncing off the floor behind him. The gymnasium features white walls, blue padded lower walls, and two basketball hoops with white backboards and red rims. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
